---
title: "Teaching"
pagetitle: "Teaching — Quan (Kyle) Zhang"
---

## Courses

**Instructor** — Introduction to Statistics · Department of Economics, UH Mānoa · Summer 2025

**Teaching Assistant** — Principles of Microeconomics & Macroeconomics · UH Mānoa · 2023–2024

## Mentoring

I am happy to talk with students interested in health economics, causal inference,
and the economics of aging. Feel free to [get in touch](mailto:quanz@hawaii.edu).
